heading: Sex offender apprehension grants
label: 10691 Sex offender apprehension grants
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3797ee of Title 42

children.heading: Authority to make sex offender apprehension grants
children.label: a Authority to make sex offender apprehension grants

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: From amounts made available to carry out this subchapter, the Attorney General may make grants to States, units of local government, Indian tribal governments, other public and private entities, and multi-jurisdictional or regional consortia thereof for activities specified in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Covered activities
children.label: 2 Covered activities
children.text: An activity referred to in paragraph (1) is any program, project, or other activity to assist a State in enforcing sex offender registration requirements.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 2007 through 2009 to carry out this subchapter.
